header.title: Twitter/X Marketing
header.description: Tweet composer with character limits, thread builder, hashtag strategy, and real-time engagement tracking for electrical services.

introText: Build your Twitter/X presence with targeted content and community engagement. From profile setup and tweet composition to trending insights and analytics, each tool helps you establish authority and reach potential clients in your local area.

ecosystemPhases.title: Establish Presence
ecosystemPhases.description: Consistent, professional tweets with targeted hashtags

ecosystemPhases.title: Build Community
ecosystemPhases.description: Foster relationships and participate in relevant conversations

ecosystemPhases.title: Amplify Reach
ecosystemPhases.description: Maximize visibility and engagement through data-driven strategies

tools.title: Profile Setup
tools.description: Professional bio templates, header design guidelines, link optimization, and verification strategies.

tools.title: Tweet Composer
tools.description: Character-optimized templates, hashtag strategies, emoji usage, and thread formatting.

tools.title: Community Engagement
tools.description: Reply templates, retweet strategies, mentions management, and conversation starters.

tools.title: Trending Insights
tools.description: Trend monitoring, viral potential assessment, timing optimization, and audience insights.

tools.title: Analytics Dashboard
tools.description: Tweet performance, follower growth, engagement rates, and audience demographics.
